stories.title: Search Detection During Init
stories.i_want_to: have search tools detected and recommended automatically
stories.so_that: I get enhanced search capabilities without manual configuration

stories.title: Tool Installation with Consent
stories.i_want_to: be asked before any tools are installed on my system
stories.so_that: I maintain control over what is installed

stories.title: Opt-Out of Search Setup
stories.i_want_to: skip search setup entirely with a flag
stories.so_that: I can install iSDLC without any search-related changes

stories.title: MCP Server Auto-Configuration
stories.i_want_to: have MCP servers configured automatically in settings.json
stories.so_that: I do not need to manually configure MCP entries

stories.title: Quick-Scan Agent Uses Enhanced Search
stories.i_want_to: have the quick-scan agent use structural search when available
stories.so_that: codebase scans are more precise and faster

stories.title: Impact Analysis Uses Enhanced Search
stories.i_want_to: have impact sub-agents use structural search for blast radius assessment
stories.so_that: impact analysis is more accurate with AST-aware results

stories.title: Force Mode Auto-Installs
stories.i_want_to: have all recommended tools installed without prompts under --force
stories.so_that: automated installations get full search capabilities

stories.title: Dry-Run Preview
stories.i_want_to: preview what search setup would do without making changes
stories.so_that: I can evaluate before committing to changes

stories.title: Discovery Agents Use Enhanced Search
stories.i_want_to: have discovery agents use structural search for architecture analysis
stories.so_that: project discovery produces more accurate results

stories.title: Help Text Documents Search Setup
stories.i_want_to: see documentation for --no-search-setup in the help text
stories.so_that: I know how to control search setup behavior
